---
title: "Jacob Jameson"
image: ../images/profile.png
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 13em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: rss
      text: blog
      href: https://jacobjameson.com/posts/blog
    - icon: envelope
      text: email
      href: mailto:jacobjameson@g.harvard.edu
    - icon: github
      text: github
      href: https://github.com/jacobjameson
    - icon: twitter
      text: twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/JacobCJameson
    - icon: mortarboard
      text: cv
      href: /Data/Jameson_vitae.pdf
    - icon: book
      text: scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=jIrUgQsAAAAJ&hl=en
    - icon: film
      text: letterboxd
      href: https://letterboxd.com/jacobjameson/
from: markdown+emoji
comments: false
page-layout: full
---

<div class="prompt-line"><span class="ps1">jacobjameson</span>@<span class="host">harvard</span>:~$<span class="cursor"></span></div>

## whoami

<div class="hero-subtitle">phd candidate &nbsp;·&nbsp; health policy &amp; decision sciences &nbsp;·&nbsp; harvard university</div>

I develop methods in [causal inference](research.qmd), Bayesian statistics, and reinforcement learning to improve decision-making in health and public policy. I am a National Institute of Mental Health (NIMH) funded Predoctoral Research Fellow in [Comparative Effectiveness Research for Suicide Prevention](https://causalab.sph.harvard.edu/suicideprevention/) at [Brigham and Women's Hospital](https://www.brighamandwomens.org), with applications to suicide prevention, emergency department operations, and precision medicine.

I also care deeply about [teaching](teaching.qmd) — I have worked with students at Harvard, UChicago Medicine, and as a Teach For America corps member in New Haven Public Schools.

<div class="tag-row">
<span class="tag">--causal-inference</span>
<span class="tag">--reinforcement-learning</span>
<span class="tag">--bayesian-stats</span>
</div>

## cat news.log

<div class="news-item">
<div class="news-date">2026-03</div>
<div class="news-text"><span class="news-flag">new</span>Selected (29/132) for the <a href="https://sites.google.com/umich.edu/isye-mse-ioe-joint-rising-star/home">2026 IOE-ISyE-MS&E Rising Stars Workshop</a>.</div>
</div>

<div class="news-item">
<div class="news-date">2026-03</div>
<div class="news-text"><span class="news-flag">new</span>Finalist in Harvard's <a href="https://gsas.harvard.edu/academics/writing/three-minute-thesis">Three Minute Thesis (3MT®) Competition</a>.</div>
</div>

<div class="news-item">
<div class="news-date">2025-09</div>
<div class="news-text">Finalist, <a href="https://connect.informs.org/discussion/finalists-of-the-2025-informs-has-best-student-paper-competition">INFORMS HAS Best Student Paper Competition</a> — <a href="/Data/INFORMS Award 2025.pdf">Honorable Mention</a>.</div>
</div>

<div class="news-item">
<div class="news-date">2025-06</div>
<div class="news-text"><a href="/Data/Distinction Award 2025.pdf">Distinction in Student Teaching</a>, Harvard Kennedy School.</div>
</div>

---

<details>
<summary>show earlier entries</summary>

<div class="news-item">
<div class="news-date">2024-05</div>
<div class="news-text"><a href="/Data/Distinction Award 2024.pdf">Distinction in Student Teaching</a> and the <a href="https://www.hks.harvard.edu/more/about/leadership-administration/academic-deans-office/slate/research-and-innovation/making/teaching#recipients">Dean's Award for Excellence in Student Teaching</a>, Harvard Kennedy School. <a href="https://chds.hsph.harvard.edu/jameson-wins-student-teaching-award/">↗</a></div>
</div>

<div class="news-item">
<div class="news-date">2024-05</div>
<div class="news-text">NIMH T32 Predoctoral Fellowship — <a href="https://causalab.sph.harvard.edu/suicideprevention/">Comparative Effectiveness Research for Suicide Risk Prevention</a>.</div>
</div>

<div class="news-item">
<div class="news-date">2024-02</div>
<div class="news-text"><a href="https://chds.hsph.harvard.edu/chds-welcomes-new-educational-innovation-scholar/">Center for Health Decision Science Educational Innovation Scholar</a>.</div>
</div>

<div class="news-item">
<div class="news-date">2024-02</div>
<div class="news-text"><a href="https://chds.hsph.harvard.edu/2024-raiffa-fund-awards/">2024 Howard Raiffa Award</a>, Harvard Center for Risk Analysis.</div>
</div>

<div class="news-item">
<div class="news-date">2023-09</div>
<div class="news-text">Finalist, <a href="https://connect.informs.org/discussion/psor-best-paper-and-best-video-competition-results">INFORMS Public Sector OR Best Video Award</a> — <a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=do6j8G9qUoM">Improving Emergency Department Flow</a>.</div>
</div>

<div class="news-item">
<div class="news-date">2023-01</div>
<div class="news-text"><a href="https://chds.hsph.harvard.edu/jameson-receives-raiffa-award/">2023 Howard Raiffa Award</a>, Harvard Center for Risk Analysis.</div>
</div>

</details>
